## Contribution Type / 贡献类型

- [ ] New Skill / 新技能
- [ ] New Agent / 新代理
- [ ] New Command / 新命令
- [ ] New Hook / 新钩子
- [ ] New Project Template / 新项目模板
- [ ] Improvement / 改进现有内容
- [ ] Documentation / Translation / 文档/翻译
- [ ] Bug Fix / 缺陷修复

## Description / 描述

What does this PR do? What problem does it solve?

## One-Person Company Value / 一人公司价值

Why is this valuable for solo founders?

## Changes / 变更清单

- file1.md: description of change
- file2.md: description of change

## Testing / 测试

How did you verify this contribution works correctly?

- [ ] Tested with actual project scenario
- [ ] Stress test scenario included (for skills)
- [ ] `python scripts/opc_health.py --target repo` passes
- [ ] `python scripts/convert.py --tool all` succeeds

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] Frontmatter format is correct (name + description)
- [ ] File is in the correct directory
- [ ] No overlap with existing content
- [ ] Bilingual content where appropriate (中/EN)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] README.md updated (if adding new top-level features)
